TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Liberia, title = Liberia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liberia} }

S.FORM: Laypizweya Zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan Kawas qutux seng mpayat kbhul mtzyu pgan sazing ptaring.Putawya,Holang,Inko,Fako pklahang tmwang mzyup.squliq nqu Oco sllwan nha rhyal mha"syaw nqu Hucyaw".maki sa qani mtbazi mqzinyut. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpusal qutux kinhangan nqu Amerika nqu lihoyan maki syaw nqu umi psrux squliq mqalux"qalang nqu mbyaqan na qalang".Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpusal sazing maki mopuw mqeru kinmhgan nqu mtzyu pgan ryax.spyang cintqalang magal mtgih qsahuy nqu mqzinyut.nanu yasa kya ruma nqu squliq mqalux mbyaq sa qani.sllwan nha mha"Monloweya".Kawas qutux se ng mspat kbhul mpusal payat pyugan sllwan nqu Laypizweya.babaw nya lga kura ptzzit nqu mkhopa nqu. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mtzyu mspat msqu nqun llamu nqu mbhyq.pinzyugang ga"linhoyan Laypizweya".Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpatul mpitu mptke hapyo.spyang gleng mtbuci nqu maki misu na maki kenli koka.Apisinyatiko ga Feco na Taluw mbyaq nqu mtbuci koka. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpitu pgan mspat ptaring .Zenhweketanana ga mthoki kenli qutux kbhul ru sazing kawas.pqhut kwara hantay zentan pincyagan.Tan qasa mmisu nqu pinsrux nqu Zentan psrux pcyagan ryax spyang qryuzyux nqu Zentan.Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mspat magal.koka Laypizweya plaqux nqu Inko.skyut nqu gong Manonkura ghyaq na rhyal. Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul ru mspat . wayal slaqux nqu koka na Fako.pkut nha sa qalang kahul sa Mali.babaw nya lga minpira spkut nya qu koka na Inko ru Fako qu rhyal nha. .babaw nqu Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul ru mspat .kya qu puqing na qes nya la. Tili/kian Koka Laypizweya qinryuxan nqu syaw na umi ga magal kbhul mtzyu mpitu kongli kayal nya ga mluw sa mkilux nqu pzyugan na behuy.qutux kawas qu hekin nqu kinklux nya ga mpusal magal ℃.Koka Laypizweya nyux maki sa Feco nqu byaqan wagi.msobih squ mkilux nqu mthwiru squ cinbwanan kura ghyaq.byaqan wagi kura mkilux bih nqu hopa na umi ru Nanmeco na koka Pasi mstwahiq ki Tasiyang ga sazing seng magal kbhul mpitu pgan magal kongli.te byaqan wagi ru kura ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa rgyax nqu Kgli kura sa ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa Cineya.te htgan wagi lga pqes sa Syangyahayan kinbhci qu rhyal nqu koka nya ga mopuw qutux mang qutux seng cyugal kbhul mtzyu pgan mqeru pinfangkongli. Kwara llyung ru langn llyung/gong koka nqu Laypizweya spyang nqu llyung nha ga gong na Mansa,gong na Lofa,gong na Sepawlo,gong na SenYehan ru gong na Cyawala.teska ga Mansa na gong ga qes nha kikoka Laypizweya ru rgyax nqu Kgli.gong nqu cyawala ga koka Laypizweya ru Syangyahayan na qes.koka na cipoq nqu gong gakya qu gong nqu Moro,gong nqu Tokewe,gong nqu Cyang ke,gong nqu Famintun,gong nqu Sankun ru gong nqu Sinaw.ungat qana qutux gong ga hhminas mtzyul sazing kongli qu kintwahiq baqun rmqras ru psplang kwara nqu gong ga wayal mzyup sa hopa nqu umi. langu koka qani ga spyang hopa nqu langu ga maki sa qalang nqu Tacya na Yizen langu.uni son nha ma Piso langu.kya qutux binah nqu hopa na langu maki sa qalang Malilang na Muze langu. Tawyi Koka qani ka hopa nqu lalu tawyi ga qalang nqu Montesalang na Utux kayal nqu taw ru Pusilotaw ru maki sa qalang nqu Cunyang Tupilitaw ru Malilang nqu mhoqil nqy taw. kayal koka nqu Laypizeya ga nyux maki sa bih nqu mthiru sa mkilux nqu rhyal.ana nyuxsa mkilux nqu kyal ga.ana ga ini khyang sa mkilux nqu kayal ru maki son maha mtkzay ru maki qu inbuw ru sqyaqih nqu hi spyang mkilux nqu byacing ga sazing ru cyugal.kinkilux nya ga tehuk sa mtzyul r.sazing tun(Has ga mqeru pgan tun).spyang hyaq nqu byacing ga byacing mspat ru mqeru 'lyan ga kinkilux nya ga maki binyaqan nya ga mopuw spat.cyugal tun(Hasmtzyu pgan tun).Syaw nqu umi ga baha hmswa ga maki qu umi nqu behuy mknhuay qu minzyupan na behuy blaq qu kayal nya.qalang nyux maki sa kska nqu koka ga mhngan lga mutu mbyaq qu hlaqi memaw ghyaq iyal.balay nya ga msluy na ryax ga maki qu hopa wagi ru blaq nqu kayal.ryax nqu mtkzay ga maki qwalax nya uzi.ini baqi iyal nqasu qu kayal nya.ana ga mtkzay nqu kayal ga maki sa mopuw qutux byacing ru tehuk sa 'nyel nqu kawas mpayat bhacing.magal byacing ru tehuk mopuw byacing ga msluy.nqu kayal.mpitu byacing mspat byacing ga maki sazing rehay ga mtkzay nqu ryax.sllwan nya ma"ryax mtkzay nqu teska".koka qani ga ungat quhmol ru msunu hopa nqu behuy. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu pslang Koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga Nogyo muya na pinbahuw nqu koka.koka qani ga sinllwa nqu Linhkong mha mkrroq kinqbaqan ru ini qbaq sintuqi sa qinnxan nqu koka.mtzyaw squ Nogyo na squliq ga pkaki squ linpgan na squliq ga mpitu pgan％.baqun muya pinbahuw ga cyugal kbhul mspat pgan mang kocin.misu qani ga inipinthuk pnayang nqu pintzyaw nha ga mopuw magal％.nniqun nha ga ini pintehukminnaki nanak nqu Syangcyaw.qqhoniq ru baliq ru naqi qani ga spyang galang nha minsinpila ru psrux squ qinnxan nha ga posun nha sa binah koka.psplang nqu koka Laypizweya qani ga spyang nha nyux sqyanyux.koba nha uzi ga ini kofuku.nanak cipoq nqu koba kbalay squ qeqaya nqu squliq. Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mspat pgan mqeru ptmasoq ru tehuk kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mtzyu na byacing mspat.pitriqan nqu koka nha nanak psplang lga mtyaqih la.kawas sazing seng .koka nqu Laypizweya ptaring mtzyaw squ koci psplang nqulinhoyan nqu Cicin na lmahang pkekaq.spyang pkbalay nqu psplang nqu zyuwaw qani.phtuw squ psplang na Zizyu.komuin nqu pinklahang ga pyugan ru koka nqu koba ga pyu cikay.kawas qasa Ihwe phtuw son maha gaga nqu psmsun kwang nqu zyuwaw ru Gaga.msswal qu kinnta ru pkihuy nqu kwang na pcyagun.Kawas sazing seng ru qutux ru magal byacing.koka nqu Laypizweya psrux Sefu nqu kinbalay kawas sazing seng qutux ru tehuk sa sazing seng ru mopuw kawas. Pintzyaw nqu gizit.spyang ga psplang nqu llamu .lmliq sinplang nha khopa qu zizyu ru kwiqan nya.kawas sazing seng ru cyugal.babaw nqu koka nqu pwah sa ini psenkyol ru kmahang sezi.mtlokah sa pkwagiq qu psplang.psrhuw sa pinbran.ptnaqun nqu pinqasu ru pbku kinbalay naptbiran.pinblaq phyupnqu gaga mthelaw pkbalay son mha"gaga nqupkzyup pila psplang"mhtuw squ giqas nqu psplang na skblaq pincyagan ru pshop sa binah nqu koka mwah miq sa pila kbalay koba uni ga maki son maha psplang nqu zyuwaw.koka nqu Laypizweya kawas sazing seng ru cyugal nqu ungat pcyagun ga thuk sa mspat pgan magal%. Nogyo-pinbahuw koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga nanak cyugal.mpatyul cyugal%nqu rhyal ga baqun muya pinbahuw.spyang blaq pinmuya ga qqhoniq.baqun muya pinbahuw ga maki squ syaw nqu umi qinruzyux nha ga magal kbhul mtzyu pgan payat kongli maki sa zit nqu rhyal qalang koka ga blaq pmyen pinbahuw.pyang nqu pinbahuw ga bwax,Syangcyaw,Susu,kafe,bilus,goqoh,Koko,abura Zunglyi,hi nqu Zunglyi,qetun,pagay,bonaw,pngran,Limung,yutak ru rramat. Syangcyaw ga spyang nqu pinbahuw nha.pibahuw nha pagay ga squliq nqu qalang maki teska ga squliq nha ga smoya pintzyuwaw nha ga muya sa pinbahuw ga myu squ rhyal nha.lomut nha qu hlahuy ru pmyoq nha qutux uni sazing pzyugan kayal lga ungat qupkblay nqu pinbahuw lga .msbinah sa binah qalang la muya pinbahuw la.baha hmswa ga ungat pila nha ru ini thozay mazi hiryo.kmloh lga ini bahi hmtuyqu qqaniq nqu kkumay ru qbhniq nqu ptyaqih sa pinbahuw.kinnloh ga ini kcingay la. kinbhci nqu hlahuy nya ga cyugal mang ru cyugal kbhul mtzyu mtzyu pinfangkongli.inmukan nqu hlahuy ga ptehuk mtzyul qutux.magal% cingay balay llamu nqu qqhoniq.kya hazi sazing kbhul mtzyul magal llamu.qhoniq nqu qsahuy ga pyang lhbaw ru mhnuk nqu qhoniq ru maki khmayru mtlokah nqu qhoniq bbiru nqu qhoniq ga ini ptnaq uzicingay llamu nya.maki sa llamu nqu .koka qhoniq gamaki mpusal qutux ga baqun kbalay qeqaya nqu ngasal. Kya mpusal qutux ga,kblazyu nqu qeqaya nqu qhoniq,baha ru kblayu nqu pintrang. Kya mpusal nqu hopa ru mtlokah nqu kinbalay naa qeqaya. Mopuw mtzyu llamu nquqeqaya nqu bbengan mpusal llamu nqu kblazyun nqu brbal koka nqu koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga hlahuy klhangan nya ga s'yunaw pintzyuwaw.misu qani ga blaq balay qu wahan nqu tuqi mkhopa nqu wanglu mblaq nqu kmut qhoniq wahan nqu qhoniq.skita koka nqu Laypizweya sefu ga maki sa zit nqu yuhun na qalang mlabang nqu kekaq hopa balay kinblaq nha.twangan Manloweya nqu zizyu nqu kong na pinsryux pposa binah nqu koka lga mblaq balay la. koci nqu psplang pposa binah koka nqu psplang pposa binah koka nqu psplang koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga.kawas pinposa nqusazing seng ru mtzyu kwara pinsplang ga mopuw qutux.mqeru pgan mpitu USD.spyang ga pposu binah nqu koka ga Syangcyaw,baliq nqu kwang naqi,kafe,qhoniq,Cwans,Yeyu,hi nqu ye,Yec nqu sinwe,llamh nqu syam ru kinbalay nqu qeqaya spyang nqu ga pposa na koka ga Intu,Amerika,Polang,Teko ru Pilis Liberia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 30 N, 9 30 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 111,369 sq km (maki' tay 104ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 96,320 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 15,049 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 4,299,944. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 28.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 44.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 27.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Monrovia. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, aring ryax 18 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Laypizweya Zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan Kawas qutux seng mpayat kbhul mtzyu pgan sazing ptaring.Putawya,Holang,Inko,Fako pklahang tmwang mzyup.squliq nqu Oco sllwan nha rhyal mha"syaw nqu Hucyaw".maki sa qani mtbazi mqzinyut. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpusal qutux kinhangan nqu Amerika nqu lihoyan maki syaw nqu umi psrux squliq mqalux"qalang nqu mbyaqan na qalang".Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpusal sazing maki mopuw mqeru kinmhgan nqu mtzyu pgan ryax.spyang cintqalang magal mtgih qsahuy nqu mqzinyut.nanu yasa kya ruma nqu squliq mqalux mbyaq sa qani.sllwan nha mha"Monloweya".Kawas qutux se ng mspat kbhul mpusal payat pyugan sllwan nqu Laypizweya.babaw nya lga kura ptzzit nqu mkhopa nqu. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mtzyu mspat msqu nqun llamu nqu mbhyq.pinzyugang ga"linhoyan Laypizweya".Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpatul mpitu mptke hapyo.spyang gleng mtbuci nqu maki misu na maki kenli koka.Apisinyatiko ga Feco na Taluw mbyaq nqu mtbuci koka. Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mpitu pgan mspat ptaring .Zenhweketanana ga mthoki kenli qutux kbhul ru sazing kawas.pqhut kwara hantay zentan pincyagan.Tan qasa mmisu nqu pinsrux nqu Zentan psrux pcyagan ryax spyang qryuzyux nqu Zentan.Kawas qutux seng mspat kbhul mspat magal.koka Laypizweya plaqux nqu Inko.skyut nqu gong Manonkura ghyaq na rhyal. Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul ru mspat . wayal slaqux nqu koka na Fako.pkut nha sa qalang kahul sa Mali.babaw nya lga minpira spkut nya qu koka na Inko ru Fako qu rhyal nha. .babaw nqu Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul ru mspat .kya qu puqing na qes nya la. Tili/kian Koka Laypizweya qinryuxan nqu syaw na umi ga magal kbhul mtzyu mpitu kongli kayal nya ga mluw sa mkilux nqu pzyugan na behuy.qutux kawas qu hekin nqu kinklux nya ga mpusal magal ℃.Koka Laypizweya nyux maki sa Feco nqu byaqan wagi.msobih squ mkilux nqu mthwiru squ cinbwanan kura ghyaq.byaqan wagi kura mkilux bih nqu hopa na umi ru Nanmeco na koka Pasi mstwahiq ki Tasiyang ga sazing seng magal kbhul mpitu pgan magal kongli.te byaqan wagi ru kura ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa rgyax nqu Kgli kura sa ghyaq ga 'mubuy sa Cineya.te htgan wagi lga pqes sa Syangyahayan kinbhci qu rhyal nqu koka nya ga mopuw qutux mang qutux seng cyugal kbhul mtzyu pgan mqeru pinfangkongli. Kwara llyung ru langn llyung/gong koka nqu Laypizweya spyang nqu llyung nha ga gong na Mansa,gong na Lofa,gong na Sepawlo,gong na SenYehan ru gong na Cyawala.teska ga Mansa na gong ga qes nha kikoka Laypizweya ru rgyax nqu Kgli.gong nqu cyawala ga koka Laypizweya ru Syangyahayan na qes.koka na cipoq nqu gong gakya qu gong nqu Moro,gong nqu Tokewe,gong nqu Cyang ke,gong nqu Famintun,gong nqu Sankun ru gong nqu Sinaw.ungat qana qutux gong ga hhminas mtzyul sazing kongli qu kintwahiq baqun rmqras ru psplang kwara nqu gong ga wayal mzyup sa hopa nqu umi. langu koka qani ga spyang hopa nqu langu ga maki sa qalang nqu Tacya na Yizen langu.uni son nha ma Piso langu.kya qutux binah nqu hopa na langu maki sa qalang Malilang na Muze langu. Tawyi Koka qani ka hopa nqu lalu tawyi ga qalang nqu Montesalang na Utux kayal nqu taw ru Pusilotaw ru maki sa qalang nqu Cunyang Tupilitaw ru Malilang nqu mhoqil nqy taw. kayal koka nqu Laypizeya ga nyux maki sa bih nqu mthiru sa mkilux nqu rhyal.ana nyuxsa mkilux nqu kyal ga.ana ga ini khyang sa mkilux nqu kayal ru maki son maha mtkzay ru maki qu inbuw ru sqyaqih nqu hi spyang mkilux nqu byacing ga sazing ru cyugal.kinkilux nya ga tehuk sa mtzyul r.sazing tun(Has ga mqeru pgan tun).spyang hyaq nqu byacing ga byacing mspat ru mqeru 'lyan ga kinkilux nya ga maki binyaqan nya ga mopuw spat.cyugal tun(Hasmtzyu pgan tun).Syaw nqu umi ga baha hmswa ga maki qu umi nqu behuy mknhuay qu minzyupan na behuy blaq qu kayal nya.qalang nyux maki sa kska nqu koka ga mhngan lga mutu mbyaq qu hlaqi memaw ghyaq iyal.balay nya ga msluy na ryax ga maki qu hopa wagi ru blaq nqu kayal.ryax nqu mtkzay ga maki qwalax nya uzi.ini baqi iyal nqasu qu kayal nya.ana ga mtkzay nqu kayal ga maki sa mopuw qutux byacing ru tehuk sa 'nyel nqu kawas mpayat bhacing.magal byacing ru tehuk mopuw byacing ga msluy.nqu kayal.mpitu byacing mspat byacing ga maki sazing rehay ga mtkzay nqu ryax.sllwan nya ma"ryax mtkzay nqu teska".koka qani ga ungat quhmol ru msunu hopa nqu behuy. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu pslang Koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga Nogyo muya na pinbahuw nqu koka.koka qani ga sinllwa nqu Linhkong mha mkrroq kinqbaqan ru ini qbaq sintuqi sa qinnxan nqu koka.mtzyaw squ Nogyo na squliq ga pkaki squ linpgan na squliq ga mpitu pgan％.baqun muya pinbahuw ga cyugal kbhul mspat pgan mang kocin.misu qani ga inipinthuk pnayang nqu pintzyaw nha ga mopuw magal％.nniqun nha ga ini pintehukminnaki nanak nqu Syangcyaw.qqhoniq ru baliq ru naqi qani ga spyang galang nha minsinpila ru psrux squ qinnxan nha ga posun nha sa binah koka.psplang nqu koka Laypizweya qani ga spyang nha nyux sqyanyux.koba nha uzi ga ini kofuku.nanak cipoq nqu koba kbalay squ qeqaya nqu squliq. Kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mspat pgan mqeru ptmasoq ru tehuk kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mtzyu na byacing mspat.pitriqan nqu koka nha nanak psplang lga mtyaqih la.kawas sazing seng .koka nqu Laypizweya ptaring mtzyaw squ koci psplang nqulinhoyan nqu Cicin na lmahang pkekaq.spyang pkbalay nqu psplang nqu zyuwaw qani.phtuw squ psplang na Zizyu.komuin nqu pinklahang ga pyugan ru koka nqu koba ga pyu cikay.kawas qasa Ihwe phtuw son maha gaga nqu psmsun kwang nqu zyuwaw ru Gaga.msswal qu kinnta ru pkihuy nqu kwang na pcyagun.Kawas sazing seng ru qutux ru magal byacing.koka nqu Laypizweya psrux Sefu nqu kinbalay kawas sazing seng qutux ru tehuk sa sazing seng ru mopuw kawas. Pintzyaw nqu gizit.spyang ga psplang nqu llamu .lmliq sinplang nha khopa qu zizyu ru kwiqan nya.kawas sazing seng ru cyugal.babaw nqu koka nqu pwah sa ini psenkyol ru kmahang sezi.mtlokah sa pkwagiq qu psplang.psrhuw sa pinbran.ptnaqun nqu pinqasu ru pbku kinbalay naptbiran.pinblaq phyupnqu gaga mthelaw pkbalay son mha"gaga nqupkzyup pila psplang"mhtuw squ giqas nqu psplang na skblaq pincyagan ru pshop sa binah nqu koka mwah miq sa pila kbalay koba uni ga maki son maha psplang nqu zyuwaw.koka nqu Laypizweya kawas sazing seng ru cyugal nqu ungat pcyagun ga thuk sa mspat pgan magal%. Nogyo-pinbahuw koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga nanak cyugal.mpatyul cyugal%nqu rhyal ga baqun muya pinbahuw.spyang blaq pinmuya ga qqhoniq.baqun muya pinbahuw ga maki squ syaw nqu umi qinruzyux nha ga magal kbhul mtzyu pgan payat kongli maki sa zit nqu rhyal qalang koka ga blaq pmyen pinbahuw.pyang nqu pinbahuw ga bwax,Syangcyaw,Susu,kafe,bilus,goqoh,Koko,abura Zunglyi,hi nqu Zunglyi,qetun,pagay,bonaw,pngran,Limung,yutak ru rramat. Syangcyaw ga spyang nqu pinbahuw nha.pibahuw nha pagay ga squliq nqu qalang maki teska ga squliq nha ga smoya pintzyuwaw nha ga muya sa pinbahuw ga myu squ rhyal nha.lomut nha qu hlahuy ru pmyoq nha qutux uni sazing pzyugan kayal lga ungat qupkblay nqu pinbahuw lga .msbinah sa binah qalang la muya pinbahuw la.baha hmswa ga ungat pila nha ru ini thozay mazi hiryo.kmloh lga ini bahi hmtuyqu qqaniq nqu kkumay ru qbhniq nqu ptyaqih sa pinbahuw.kinnloh ga ini kcingay la. kinbhci nqu hlahuy nya ga cyugal mang ru cyugal kbhul mtzyu mtzyu pinfangkongli.inmukan nqu hlahuy ga ptehuk mtzyul qutux.magal% cingay balay llamu nqu qqhoniq.kya hazi sazing kbhul mtzyul magal llamu.qhoniq nqu qsahuy ga pyang lhbaw ru mhnuk nqu qhoniq ru maki khmayru mtlokah nqu qhoniq bbiru nqu qhoniq ga ini ptnaq uzicingay llamu nya.maki sa llamu nqu .koka qhoniq gamaki mpusal qutux ga baqun kbalay qeqaya nqu ngasal. Kya mpusal qutux ga,kblazyu nqu qeqaya nqu qhoniq,baha ru kblayu nqu pintrang. Kya mpusal nqu hopa ru mtlokah nqu kinbalay naa qeqaya. Mopuw mtzyu llamu nquqeqaya nqu bbengan mpusal llamu nqu kblazyun nqu brbal koka nqu koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga hlahuy klhangan nya ga s'yunaw pintzyuwaw.misu qani ga blaq balay qu wahan nqu tuqi mkhopa nqu wanglu mblaq nqu kmut qhoniq wahan nqu qhoniq.skita koka nqu Laypizweya sefu ga maki sa zit nqu yuhun na qalang mlabang nqu kekaq hopa balay kinblaq nha.twangan Manloweya nqu zizyu nqu kong na pinsryux pposa binah nqu koka lga mblaq balay la. koci nqu psplang pposa binah koka nqu psplang pposa binah koka nqu psplang koka nqu Laypizweya qani ga.kawas pinposa nqusazing seng ru mtzyu kwara pinsplang ga mopuw qutux.mqeru pgan mpitu USD.spyang ga pposu binah nqu koka ga Syangcyaw,baliq nqu kwang naqi,kafe,qhoniq,Cwans,Yeyu,hi nqu ye,Yec nqu sinwe,llamh nqu syam ru kinbalay nqu qeqaya spyang nqu ga pposa na koka ga Intu,Amerika,Polang,Teko ru Pilis Liberia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 30 N, 9 30 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 111,369 sq km (maki' tay 104ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 96,320 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 15,049 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 4,299,944. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 28.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 44.60%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 27.30%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Monrovia. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, aring ryax 18 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: lajpizweja zjuwaw nqu kinβkis~ɕan kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mpajat kβħul mtzju pɣan s~ɕaziŋ ptariŋ.putawja,ħolaŋ,inko,*ako pklaħaŋ tmwaŋ mzjup.s~ɕquliq nqu oʦ~ʨo s~ɕllwan nħa rħjal mħa"s~ɕjaw nqu ħuʦ~ʨjaw".maki s~ɕa qani mtβazi mqzinjut. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mpus~ɕal qutux kinħaŋan nqu amerika nqu liħojan maki s~ɕjaw nqu umi ps~ɕrux s~ɕquliq mqalux"qalaŋ nqu mβjaqan na qalaŋ".kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mpus~ɕal s~ɕaziŋ maki mopuw mqeru kinmħɣan nqu mtzju pɣan rjax.s~ɕpjaŋ ʦ~ʨintqalaŋ maɣal mtɣiħ qs~ɕaħuj nqu mqzinjut.nanu jas~ɕa kja ruma nqu s~ɕquliq mqalux mβjaq s~ɕa qani.s~ɕllwan nħa mħa"monloweja".kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕe ŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mpus~ɕal pajat pjuɣan s~ɕllwan nqu lajpizweja.βaβaw nja lɣa kura ptzzit nqu mkħopa nqu. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mtzju ms~ɕpat ms~ɕqu nqun llamu nqu mβħjq.pinzjuɣaŋ ɣa"linħojan lajpizweja".kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mpatul mpitu mptke ħapjo.s~ɕpjaŋ ɣleŋ mtβuʦ~ʨi nqu maki mis~ɕu na maki kenli koka.apis~ɕinjatiko ɣa *eʦ~ʨo na taluw mβjaq nqu mtβuʦ~ʨi koka. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mpitu pɣan ms~ɕpat ptariŋ .zenħweketanana ɣa mtħoki kenli qutux kβħul ru s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ.pqħut kwara ħantaj zentan pinʦ~ʨjaɣan.tan qas~ɕa mmis~ɕu nqu pins~ɕrux nqu zentan ps~ɕrux pʦ~ʨjaɣan rjax s~ɕpjaŋ qrjuzjux nqu zentan.kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul ms~ɕpat maɣal.koka lajpizweja plaqux nqu inko.s~ɕkjut nqu ɣoŋ manonkura ɣħjaq na rħjal. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul ru ms~ɕpat . wajal s~ɕlaqux nqu koka na *ako.pkut nħa s~ɕa qalaŋ kaħul s~ɕa mali.βaβaw nja lɣa minpira s~ɕpkut nja qu koka na inko ru *ako qu rħjal nħa. .βaβaw nqu kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul ru ms~ɕpat .kja qu puqiŋ na qes~ɕ nja la. tili/kian koka lajpizweja qinrjuxan nqu s~ɕjaw na umi ɣa maɣal kβħul mtzju mpitu koŋli kajal nja ɣa mluw s~ɕa mkilux nqu pzjuɣan na βeħuj.qutux kawas~ɕ qu ħekin nqu kinklux nja ɣa mpus~ɕal maɣal *.koka lajpizweja njux maki s~ɕa *eʦ~ʨo nqu βjaqan waɣi.ms~ɕoβiħ s~ɕqu mkilux nqu mtħwiru s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨinβwanan kura ɣħjaq.βjaqan waɣi kura mkilux βiħ nqu ħopa na umi ru nanmeʦ~ʨo na koka pas~ɕi ms~ɕtwaħiq ki tas~ɕijaŋ ɣa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ maɣal kβħul mpitu pɣan maɣal koŋli.te βjaqan waɣi ru kura ɣħjaq ɣa ʔmuβuj s~ɕa rɣjax nqu kɣli kura s~ɕa ɣħjaq ɣa ʔmuβuj s~ɕa ʦ~ʨineja.te ħtɣan waɣi lɣa pqes~ɕ s~ɕa s~ɕjaŋjaħajan kinβħʦ~ʨi qu rħjal nqu koka nja ɣa mopuw qutux maŋ qutux s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul mtzju pɣan mqeru pin*aŋkoŋli. kwara lljuŋ ru laŋn lljuŋ/ɣoŋ koka nqu lajpizweja s~ɕpjaŋ nqu lljuŋ nħa ɣa ɣoŋ na mans~ɕa,ɣoŋ na lo*a,ɣoŋ na s~ɕepawlo,ɣoŋ na s~ɕenjeħan ru ɣoŋ na ʦ~ʨjawala.tes~ɕka ɣa mans~ɕa na ɣoŋ ɣa qes~ɕ nħa kikoka lajpizweja ru rɣjax nqu kɣli.ɣoŋ nqu ʦ~ʨjawala ɣa koka lajpizweja ru s~ɕjaŋjaħajan na qes~ɕ.koka na ʦ~ʨipoq nqu ɣoŋ ɣakja qu ɣoŋ nqu moro,ɣoŋ nqu tokewe,ɣoŋ nqu ʦ~ʨjaŋ ke,ɣoŋ nqu *amintun,ɣoŋ nqu s~ɕankun ru ɣoŋ nqu s~ɕinaw.uŋat qana qutux ɣoŋ ɣa ħħminas~ɕ mtzjul s~ɕaziŋ koŋli qu kintwaħiq βaqun rmqras~ɕ ru ps~ɕplaŋ kwara nqu ɣoŋ ɣa wajal mzjup s~ɕa ħopa nqu umi. laŋu koka qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ ħopa nqu laŋu ɣa maki s~ɕa qalaŋ nqu taʦ~ʨja na jizen laŋu.uni s~ɕon nħa ma pis~ɕo laŋu.kja qutux βinaħ nqu ħopa na laŋu maki s~ɕa qalaŋ malilaŋ na muze laŋu. tawji koka qani ka ħopa nqu lalu tawji ɣa qalaŋ nqu montes~ɕalaŋ na utux kajal nqu taw ru pus~ɕilotaw ru maki s~ɕa qalaŋ nqu ʦ~ʨunjaŋ tupilitaw ru malilaŋ nqu mħoqil nqj taw. kajal koka nqu lajpizeja ɣa njux maki s~ɕa βiħ nqu mtħiru s~ɕa mkilux nqu rħjal.ana njuxs~ɕa mkilux nqu kjal ɣa.ana ɣa ini kħjaŋ s~ɕa mkilux nqu kajal ru maki s~ɕon maħa mtkzaj ru maki qu inβuw ru s~ɕqjaqiħ nqu ħi s~ɕpjaŋ mkilux nqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa s~ɕaziŋ ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal.kinkilux nja ɣa teħuk s~ɕa mtzjul r.s~ɕaziŋ tun(ħas~ɕ ɣa mqeru pɣan tun).s~ɕpjaŋ ħjaq nqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ms~ɕpat ru mqeru ʔljan ɣa kinkilux nja ɣa maki βinjaqan nja ɣa mopuw s~ɕpat.ʦ~ʨjuɣal tun(ħas~ɕmtzju pɣan tun).s~ɕjaw nqu umi ɣa βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa maki qu umi nqu βeħuj mknħuaj qu minzjupan na βeħuj βlaq qu kajal nja.qalaŋ njux maki s~ɕa ks~ɕka nqu koka ɣa mħŋan lɣa mutu mβjaq qu ħlaqi memaw ɣħjaq ijal.βalaj nja ɣa ms~ɕluj na rjax ɣa maki qu ħopa waɣi ru βlaq nqu kajal.rjax nqu mtkzaj ɣa maki qwalax nja uzi.ini βaqi ijal nqas~ɕu qu kajal nja.ana ɣa mtkzaj nqu kajal ɣa maki s~ɕa mopuw qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru teħuk s~ɕa ʔnjel nqu kawas~ɕ mpajat βħaʦ~ʨiŋ.maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru teħuk mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa ms~ɕluj.nqu kajal.mpitu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa maki s~ɕaziŋ reħaj ɣa mtkzaj nqu rjax.s~ɕllwan nja ma"rjax mtkzaj nqu tes~ɕka".koka qani ɣa uŋat quħmol ru ms~ɕunu ħopa nqu βeħuj. ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu ps~ɕlaŋ koka nqu lajpizweja qani ɣa noɣjo muja na pinβaħuw nqu koka.koka qani ɣa s~ɕinllwa nqu linħkoŋ mħa mkrroq kinqβaqan ru ini qβaq s~ɕintuqi s~ɕa qinnxan nqu koka.mtzjaw s~ɕqu noɣjo na s~ɕquliq ɣa pkaki s~ɕqu linpɣan na s~ɕquliq ɣa mpitu pɣan*.βaqun muja pinβaħuw ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul ms~ɕpat pɣan maŋ koʦ~ʨin.mis~ɕu qani ɣa inipintħuk pnajaŋ nqu pintzjaw nħa ɣa mopuw maɣal*.nniqun nħa ɣa ini pinteħukminnaki nanak nqu s~ɕjaŋʦ~ʨjaw.qqħoniq ru βaliq ru naqi qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ ɣalaŋ nħa mins~ɕinpila ru ps~ɕrux s~ɕqu qinnxan nħa ɣa pos~ɕun nħa s~ɕa βinaħ koka.ps~ɕplaŋ nqu koka lajpizweja qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ nħa njux s~ɕqjanjux.koβa nħa uzi ɣa ini ko*uku.nanak ʦ~ʨipoq nqu koβa kβalaj s~ɕqu qeqaja nqu s~ɕquliq. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul ms~ɕpat pɣan mqeru ptmas~ɕoq ru teħuk kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mtzju na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ms~ɕpat.pitriqan nqu koka nħa nanak ps~ɕplaŋ lɣa mtjaqiħ la.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ .koka nqu lajpizweja ptariŋ mtzjaw s~ɕqu koʦ~ʨi ps~ɕplaŋ nqulinħojan nqu ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨin na lmaħaŋ pkekaq.s~ɕpjaŋ pkβalaj nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nqu zjuwaw qani.pħtuw s~ɕqu ps~ɕplaŋ na zizju.komuin nqu pinklaħaŋ ɣa pjuɣan ru koka nqu koβa ɣa pju ʦ~ʨikaj.kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa iħwe pħtuw s~ɕon maħa ɣaɣa nqu ps~ɕms~ɕun kwaŋ nqu zjuwaw ru ɣaɣa.ms~ɕs~ɕwal qu kinnta ru pkiħuj nqu kwaŋ na pʦ~ʨjaɣun.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru qutux ru maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ.koka nqu lajpizweja ps~ɕrux s~ɕe*u nqu kinβalaj kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ qutux ru teħuk s~ɕa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mopuw kawas~ɕ. pintzjaw nqu ɣizit.s~ɕpjaŋ ɣa ps~ɕplaŋ nqu llamu .lmliq s~ɕinplaŋ nħa kħopa qu zizju ru kwiqan nja.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal.βaβaw nqu koka nqu pwaħ s~ɕa ini ps~ɕenkjol ru kmaħaŋ s~ɕezi.mtlokaħ s~ɕa pkwaɣiq qu ps~ɕplaŋ.ps~ɕrħuw s~ɕa pinβran.ptnaqun nqu pinqas~ɕu ru pβku kinβalaj naptβiran.pinβlaq pħjupnqu ɣaɣa mtħelaw pkβalaj s~ɕon mħa"ɣaɣa nqupkzjup pila ps~ɕplaŋ"mħtuw s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ nqu ps~ɕplaŋ na s~ɕkβlaq pinʦ~ʨjaɣan ru ps~ɕħop s~ɕa βinaħ nqu koka mwaħ miq s~ɕa pila kβalaj koβa uni ɣa maki s~ɕon maħa ps~ɕplaŋ nqu zjuwaw.koka nqu lajpizweja kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal nqu uŋat pʦ~ʨjaɣun ɣa tħuk s~ɕa ms~ɕpat pɣan maɣal%. noɣjo-pinβaħuw koka nqu lajpizweja qani ɣa nanak ʦ~ʨjuɣal.mpatjul ʦ~ʨjuɣal%nqu rħjal ɣa βaqun muja pinβaħuw.s~ɕpjaŋ βlaq pinmuja ɣa qqħoniq.βaqun muja pinβaħuw ɣa maki s~ɕqu s~ɕjaw nqu umi qinruzjux nħa ɣa maɣal kβħul mtzju pɣan pajat koŋli maki s~ɕa zit nqu rħjal qalaŋ koka ɣa βlaq pmjen pinβaħuw.pjaŋ nqu pinβaħuw ɣa βwax,s~ɕjaŋʦ~ʨjaw,s~ɕus~ɕu,ka*e,βilus~ɕ,ɣoqoħ,koko,aβura zuŋlji,ħi nqu zuŋlji,qetun,paɣaj,βonaw,pŋran,limuŋ,jutak ru rramat. s~ɕjaŋʦ~ʨjaw ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ nqu pinβaħuw nħa.piβaħuw nħa paɣaj ɣa s~ɕquliq nqu qalaŋ maki tes~ɕka ɣa s~ɕquliq nħa ɣa s~ɕmoja pintzjuwaw nħa ɣa muja s~ɕa pinβaħuw ɣa mju s~ɕqu rħjal nħa.lomut nħa qu ħlaħuj ru pmjoq nħa qutux uni s~ɕaziŋ pzjuɣan kajal lɣa uŋat qupkβlaj nqu pinβaħuw lɣa .ms~ɕβinaħ s~ɕa βinaħ qalaŋ la muja pinβaħuw la.βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa uŋat pila nħa ru ini tħozaj mazi ħirjo.kmloħ lɣa ini βaħi ħmtujqu qqaniq nqu kkumaj ru qβħniq nqu ptjaqiħ s~ɕa pinβaħuw.kinnloħ ɣa ini kʦ~ʨiŋaj la. kinβħʦ~ʨi nqu ħlaħuj nja ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal maŋ ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul mtzju mtzju pin*aŋkoŋli.inmukan nqu ħlaħuj ɣa pteħuk mtzjul qutux.maɣal% ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj llamu nqu qqħoniq.kja ħazi s~ɕaziŋ kβħul mtzjul maɣal llamu.qħoniq nqu qs~ɕaħuj ɣa pjaŋ lħβaw ru mħnuk nqu qħoniq ru maki kħmajru mtlokaħ nqu qħoniq ββiru nqu qħoniq ɣa ini ptnaq uziʦ~ʨiŋaj llamu nja.maki s~ɕa llamu nqu .koka qħoniq ɣamaki mpus~ɕal qutux ɣa βaqun kβalaj qeqaja nqu ŋas~ɕal. kja mpus~ɕal qutux ɣa,kβlazju nqu qeqaja nqu qħoniq,βaħa ru kβlaju nqu pintraŋ. kja mpus~ɕal nqu ħopa ru mtlokaħ nqu kinβalaj naa qeqaja. mopuw mtzju llamu nquqeqaja nqu ββeŋan mpus~ɕal llamu nqu kβlazjun nqu βrβal koka nqu koka nqu lajpizweja qani ɣa ħlaħuj klħaŋan nja ɣa s~ɕʔjunaw pintzjuwaw.mis~ɕu qani ɣa βlaq βalaj qu waħan nqu tuqi mkħopa nqu waŋlu mβlaq nqu kmut qħoniq waħan nqu qħoniq.s~ɕkita koka nqu lajpizweja s~ɕe*u ɣa maki s~ɕa zit nqu juħun na qalaŋ mlaβaŋ nqu kekaq ħopa βalaj kinβlaq nħa.twaŋan manloweja nqu zizju nqu koŋ na pins~ɕrjux ppos~ɕa βinaħ nqu koka lɣa mβlaq βalaj la. koʦ~ʨi nqu ps~ɕplaŋ ppos~ɕa βinaħ koka nqu ps~ɕplaŋ ppos~ɕa βinaħ koka nqu ps~ɕplaŋ koka nqu lajpizweja qani ɣa.kawas~ɕ pinpos~ɕa nqus~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru mtzju kwara pins~ɕplaŋ ɣa mopuw qutux.mqeru pɣan mpitu us~ɕ*.s~ɕpjaŋ ɣa ppos~ɕu βinaħ nqu koka ɣa s~ɕjaŋʦ~ʨjaw,βaliq nqu kwaŋ naqi,ka*e,qħoniq,ʦ~ʨwans~ɕ,jeju,ħi nqu je,jeʦ~ʨ nqu s~ɕinwe,llamħ nqu s~ɕjam ru kinβalaj nqu qeqaja s~ɕpjaŋ nqu ɣa ppos~ɕa na koka ɣa intu,amerika,polaŋ,teko ru pilis~ɕ liβeria ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj * ** n, * ** w na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa monro*ia. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mpituʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ellen *oħns~ɕon s~ɕirlea*, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
